name: Operator OS
headline: Use Operator OS as the premium software lane at the center of the business
idealFor: Best for founder-led teams, operators, and technical buyers
description: Operator OS is the clearest recurring offer inside myappai. It combines the public funnel, admin workflow, content system, and deploy visibility into one command-centered product.
bullets: Manage pages, offers, and workflow execution from one system
Use natural language or direct commands to shape the live app
Keep payment and deployment visibility in the same operator surface

proofPoints.title: The custom GPT operator now targets the real live app
proofPoints.description: Natural-language edits are scoped to the actual frontend and content layers that power production.

proofPoints.title: Payments, leads, and deployments stay connected
proofPoints.description: The runtime keeps the commercial and operational layers visible instead of splitting them into disconnected tools.

proofPoints.title: Checkout-first when providers are ready
proofPoints.description: Operator OS is designed for a fast purchase path with Stripe or PayPal routing when configured.

sections.title: Command-centered operations
sections.description: Use the same system to manage offers, content, and admin actions.

sections.title: Premium public-to-admin workflow
sections.description: The redesign aligns the public site and operator console so the product feels coherent end to end.

sections.title: Expansion path
sections.description: Operator OS creates the strongest entry point into implementation help, team usage, and enterprise deployment.

cta.heading: Lead with Operator OS when the buyer is ready to move now.
cta.body: This is the shortest path from trust to recurring value because the offer, UI, and deploy story are aligned.
